message:
Implement P4.1: Interactive TUI Wizard with encryption integration

Complete 7-step wizard for pages export:
- Step 1: Dynamic agent/workspace loading from database
- Step 2: Password with strength indicator, recovery secret generation
- Step 3: Site title, description, metadata privacy options
- Step 4: Deployment target (Local/GitHub/Cloudflare)
- Step 5: Pre-publish configuration summary
- Step 6: Export with progress, actual encryption via EncryptionEngine
- Step 7: Deployment instructions (deployers are stubs for P4.2/P4.3)

Integration with existing modules:
- SqliteStorage for agent/workspace enumeration
- ExportEngine for filtered database export
- EncryptionEngine for AES-256-GCM encryption with key slots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
